metadata.description: A virtual engineering team for solo founders. Core skills (plan review, code review, automation pipelines, thinking partners) plus modular stack experts (iOS, Android, AI engineering, Designer, Marketer, Neo4j). Install what you need.

plugins.name: solopreneur
plugins.description: Core skills: plan review, code review loops, backlog management, and thinking partners.

plugins.name: designer
plugins.description: UI/UX design expertise. Ships the designer agent and 10 vendored third-party design skills (taste-* archetype family + impeccable).

plugins.name: ios-dev
plugins.description: iOS/macOS SwiftUI expertise. Ships the ios-dev agent, ios-patterns, and 23 vendored third-party skills (iphone-apps + asc-* App Store Connect CLI).

plugins.name: android-dev
plugins.description: Android/Kotlin expertise. Ships the android-dev agent, android-patterns, and 39 vendored third-party skills (Compose / architecture / Gradle + 18 gplay-* Google Play Console CLI + 6 official Android team skills).

plugins.name: ai-engineer
plugins.description: AI / LLM application engineering expertise. Ships the ai-engineer agent plus 1 in-house skill (langgraph) and 3 vendored skills (ai-engineering, senior-prompt-engineer, prompt-architect) for production LLM systems, RAG, agents, and prompt design.

plugins.name: marketer
plugins.description: Marketing / brand / writing expertise. Ships the marketer agent plus GTM strategy, naming, X/Twitter & LinkedIn growth, AI-pattern removal, and brand-aware slide design.

plugins.name: neo4j-dev
plugins.description: Neo4j graph database expertise. Ships the neo4j-dev agent and 4 vendored third-party skills (cypher / cypher-guide / migration / cli-tools).
